sourcesContent:
const projects = [
  {
    id: 1,
    name: "Gymate",
    emoji: "🏋️",
    color: "#ff6b35",
    bg: "linear-gradient(135deg, #1a0a00, #2a1200)",
    description:
      "A modern gym & fitness platform with workout tracking, BMI calculator, exercise library, and personalized fitness routines for all levels.",
    tags: ["React", "JavaScript", "CSS3", "REST API"],
    demo: "https://3dd-portfolio.vercel.app/",
    code: "https://github.com/dharthtiw2207/GymBuddy",
  },
  {
    id: 2,
    name: "EXPLORA",
    emoji: "🌍",
    color: "#00b4d8",
    bg: "linear-gradient(135deg, #000d1a, #001a2e)",
    description:
      "Travel discovery app featuring interactive maps, curated destination guides, real-time weather, booking integration, and smart trip planning tools.",
    tags: ["React", "Node.js", "MongoDB", "Maps API"],
    demo: "https://explora-x.vercel.app/",
    code: "https://github.com/dharthtiw2207/ExploraX",
  },
  {
    id: 3,
    name: "Ecommerce Website",
    emoji: "🛍️",
    color: "#a259ff",
    bg: "linear-gradient(135deg, #0d001a, #150025)",
    description:
      "Full-stack e-commerce platform with product listings, cart management, Stripe payment integration, order tracking, and an admin dashboard.",
    tags: ["React", "Node.js", "Express", "MongoDB"],
    demo: "https://ecom-store-demo.netlify.app",
    code: "https://github.com/siddhartha-tiwari/ecommerce",
  },
];

export default projects;
